zh.lifeSummary: 當Emme DE LILLERS於1089年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯利勒斯時，她的父親Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers23歲，母親Ermentrude D'AIRE18歲。她和Roger II De Wavrin至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1143年之後在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦福林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emme DE LILLERS于1089年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯利勒斯时，她的父亲Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers23岁，母亲Ermentrude D'AIRE18岁。她和Roger II De Wavrin至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1143年之后在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦福林。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: LILLERS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmuth, Ingeborg, Johann.
North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Willer  .
English (Cambridgeshire, Lincolnshire, and Essex): variant of Willer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Willer
meanings: German and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wil ‘will, desire’ + heri ‘army’.

English: perhaps in some cases an occupational name from a shortened form of Willyer, now extinct, but derived from Middle English wilier ‘one who works in willow’, a derivative of Middle English wily (Old English wilige) ‘willow’ + -er ‘worker in willow’, probably a maker of baskets or hurdles.

nameMeanings.name: Emme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: male name, from Old French esme ‘esteemed, loved’ (from Latin aestimare ‘to value, esteem’), which was introduced to Scotland in the 16th century. Since the 18th century it has also been in use in the English-speaking world as a female name and it is now much more popular as a name for girls than boys. It occurs in various forms, often written without the accent.

variants.name: Esmée
meanings: male name, from Old French esme ‘esteemed, loved’ (from Latin aestimare ‘to value, esteem’), which was introduced to Scotland in the 16th century. Since the 18th century it has also been in use in the English-speaking world as a female name and it is now much more popular as a name for girls than boys. It occurs in various forms, often written without the accent.

variants.name: Esmie
meanings: male name, from Old French esme ‘esteemed, loved’ (from Latin aestimare ‘to value, esteem’), which was introduced to Scotland in the 16th century. Since the 18th century it has also been in use in the English-speaking world as a female name and it is now much more popular as a name for girls than boys. It occurs in various forms, often written without the accent.

en.lifeSummary: When Emme DE LILLERS was born in 1089, in Lillers, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers, was 23 and her mother, Ermentrude D'AIRE, was 18. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Roger II De Wavrin. She died after 1143, in Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emme DE LILLERS est née en 1089, à Lillers, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude D'AIRE, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Roger II De Wavrin. Elle est décédée après 1143, à Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emme DE LILLERS 1089 in Lillers, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers 23 und ihre Mutter Ermentrude D'AIRE 18. Sie hatte mit Roger II De Wavrin mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1143 in Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emme DE LILLERS è nata il nel 1089 nel Lillers, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Ermentrude D'AIRE, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Roger II De Wavrin. Morì dopo il 1143, nel Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Emme DE LILLERSが1089年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスリラーズで生まれた時，父Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilersは23歳，母Ermentrude D'AIREは18歳であった。彼女はRoger II De Wavrinとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1143年以後にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードワvリンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emme DE LILLERS(이)가 1089년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 릴레르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermentrude D'AIRE(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Roger II De Wavrin(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1143년 이후 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 와브린에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emme DE LILLERS nasceu em 1089, em Lillers, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude D'AIRE, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Roger II De Wavrin. Ela faleceu após 1143, em Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emme DE LILLERS родилась в 1089 г. в местности лиллирс, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude D'AIRE, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Roger II De Wavrin. Она умерла после 1143 г. в местности ваврин, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emme DE LILLERS nació en 1089, en Lillers, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Wenemar de Lilers Sire de Lilers, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Ermentrude D'AIRE, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Roger II De Wavrin. Murió después de 1143, en Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
